2605.02681.title: The Design and Composition of Structural Causal Decision Processes
2605.02681.paper_summary: We present two new classes of causal models of decision-making agents. Our approach is motivated by the needs of modeling the economics of computing systems. These systems are composed of subsystems and can exhibit endogenous limits on cognitive resources and value discounting. Structural Causal Decision Models (SCDMs) expand on Structural Causal Influence Models. Like SCIMs, they explicitly represent the causal relationships between model variables and the payoffs of agent decisions. Additionally, agent decisions can be constrained by their causal antecedents, and SCDMs can have open root variables for which no probability distribution or structural equation is given. We show that SCDMs have a well-defined and computationally useful property of composability. Building on SCDMs, we then define a Structural Causal Decision Process (SCDP) as a recurring SCDM with a discount variable. SCDPs benefit from the useful composition properties of SCDMs. Moreover, SCDPs are strictly more expressive than POMDPs because they do not assume rational belief formation. Indeed, an SCDP can endogenously model the memory-formation process, and is thus useful for modeling resource rational agents in dynamic settings. SCDPs are also capable of modeling variable discounting, a tool used widely in social scientific modeling. We pose that SCDPs are a useful framework for policy simulation for the digital economy, mechanism design for information systems, and digital twin modeling of cyberinfrastructure.
2605.02681.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了兩種新的因果模型類別，用於決策代理。 我們的方法是基於建模計算系統經濟學的需求。 這些系統由子系統組成，並且可能表現出對認知資源和價值折扣的內生限制。 結構因果決策模型（SCDMs）擴展了結構因果影響模型。 像SCIMs一樣，它們明確表示模型變數與代理決策的回報之間的因果關係。 此外，代理的決策可能受到其因果前因的限制，並且SCDMs可以有開放的根變數，這些變數沒有給出概率分佈或結構方程式。 我們展示了SCDMs具有良好定義且在計算上有用的可組合性質。 基於SCDMs，我們然後定義了一個結構因果決策過程（SCDP），作為帶有折扣變數的重複SCDM。 SCDPs受益於SCDMs的有用組合性質。 此外，SCDPs在表達能力上嚴格超過POMDPs，因為它們不假設理性信念形成。 實際上，SCDP可以內生地建模記憶形成過程，因此對於在動態環境中建模資源理性代理非常有用。 SCDPs還能夠建模變量折扣，這是一種在社會科學建模中廣泛使用的工具。 我們認為SCDPs是數位經濟政策模擬、信息系統機制設計以及網絡基礎設施數位雙胞胎建模的有用框架。
2605.02681.author: Sebastian Benthall et.al.
